headline: Is Adobe (ADBE) Now An Opportunity After A 36.6% One Year Share Price Fall?
summary: If you are wondering whether Adobe's recent share price puts it in bargain territory or if the story is more complicated, this article is for you. Adobe's stock closed at US$275.13, with returns of 1.5% over 7 days and 2.5% over 30 days, while year to date the return is a 17.5% decline and over 1 year the return is a 36.6% decline, framing a very different picture to the shorter term moves. Recent headlines around Adobe have focused on its position in creative software and digital media...

headline: Inflation Data, G-7 Meeting: Still to Come This Week
summary: The release of the consumer-price index will take center stage Wednesday morning, with more inflation data due later in the week. Earnings are due from Campbell's, Adobe and Dollar General in the coming days.

headline: Adobe, MLB Expand Partnership To Power AI-Driven Fan Experiences
summary: Adobe Inc. and Major League Baseball (MLB) announced a major expansion of their multi-year partnership Monday. The deal positions Adobe as the official Presenting Sponsor of MLB Opening Day in 2026, 2027, and 2028. The partnership arms MLB’s marketing, product, and content teams with Adobe’s enterprise AI tools. It targets fan engagement across digital platforms at scale. What the Expanded Deal Covers Adobe’s expanded role includes four key technology deployments across MLB operations. Don't Mis
